title: The Weekly Challenge - 162
task1_desc: Write a script to generate the check digit of given ISBN-13 code. Please refer [wikipedia](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/International_Standard_Book_Number#ISBN-13_check_digit_calculation) for more information.
task1_body: Write a script to generate the check digit of given ISBN-13 code. Please refer [wikipedia](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/International_Standard_Book_Number#ISBN-13_check_digit_calculation) for more information. ##### Example ISBN-13 check digit for '978-0-306-40615-7' is 7.
task2_desc: Implement encryption and decryption using [the Wheatstone-Playfair cipher](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Playfair_cipher).
task2_body:
Implement encryption and decryption using [the Wheatstone-Playfair cipher](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Playfair_cipher). ##### Examples: (These combine I and J, and use X as padding.) encrypt("playfair example", "hide the gold in the tree stump") = "bmodzbxdnabekudmuixmmouvif" decrypt("perl and raku", "siderwrdulfipaarkcrw") = "thewexeklychallengex"
Last date to submit the solution **23:59 (UK Time) Sunday 1st May 2022**.
